parts.text: An agent PR can be green and still be wrong — a leftover conflict marker, a focused test that quietly skips the whole suite, a pasted private key. A human reviewer catches those by eye. At 3am, nobody's looking.
mergegate ships a curated library of pre-built checks for exactly those agent-PR failure modes — and you add one in a single command.

Here's an agent PR that passes the spec gate — it looks done. But it left a conflict marker and a focused test behind. Browse the library, add the two checks that bite, and re-run: now mergegate blocks it. The gate caught what the agent didn't.
mergegate. Hold agent PRs to a provably-done bar. From deemwar.

cards.title: Green isn't done.
cards.subtitle: an agent PR can pass and still ship a conflict marker, a focused test, a leaked key

captions.text: Just the spec gate → the agent PR passes. Looks done.
A curated library of checks for the common agent-PR failure modes.
checks add — drop two gates into the config in one command.
Re-run → BLOCKED. Conflict marker + focused test caught.
